zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel Lincoln於大約1085年出生在英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比時，她的父親Picot of Lincoln23歲，母親Beatrice32歲。她和Robert de la Haye至少有4個兒子。她去世於1123年在英國素可康普頓享年39歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪曼其雷賽。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel Lincoln于大约1085年出生在英国林可爾史爾布拉特萊比时，她的父亲Picot of Lincoln23岁，母亲Beatrice32岁。她和Robert de la Haye至少有4个儿子。她去世于1123年在英国素可康普頓享年39岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪曼其雷賽。

nameMeanings.name: Lincoln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linkins
meanings: English: variant of Linkin, which itself is a form of Lincoln , prevalent in Kent.

variants.name: Lindsay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel Lincoln was born about 1085, in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Picot of Lincoln, was 23 and her mother, Beatrice, was 32. She had at least 4 sons with Robert de la Haye. She died in 1123, in Compton, Sussex, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lessay, Manche, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel Lincoln est née environ 1085, à Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Picot of Lincoln, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Robert de la Haye. Elle est décédée en 1123, à Compton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Lessay, Manche, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel Lincoln um 1085 in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Picot of Lincoln 23 und ihre Mutter Beatrice 32. Sie hatte mit Robert de la Haye mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1123 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Compton, Sussex, England und wurde in Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Lincoln è nata il circa 1085 nel Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Picot of Lincoln, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Beatrice, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Robert de la Haye. Morì nel 1123, nel Compton, Sussex, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriel Lincolnが約1085年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブラットレビーで生まれた時，父Picot of Lincolnは23歳，母Beatriceは32歳であった。彼女はRobert de la Hayeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1123年にイギリススセックスコンプトンで39歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディマンチェレッサイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muriel Lincoln(이)가 대략 1085년 영국 링코실르 브래틀레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Picot of Lincoln(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Robert de la Haye(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1123년 영국 수세스 콤프턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 레지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Lincoln nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Picot of Lincoln, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Robert de la Haye. Ela faleceu em 1123, em Compton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Lessay, Manche, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel Lincoln родилась около 1085 г. в местности браттлеби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Picot of Lincoln было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Robert de la Haye. Она умерла в 1123 г. в местности комптон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности лессеи, манч, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriel Lincoln nació aproximadamente 1085, en Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Picot of Lincoln, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Robert de la Haye. Murió en 1123, en Compton, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Francia.
